user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement 3-phase PWM motor control on TC387
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3 complementary HS/LS PWM pairs on GTM TOM1 Cluster_1 in center-aligned mode at 20 kHz with 1 µs deadtime (rising and falling), synchronous start and synchronous update using TOM1 CH0 as master; initialize duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%; provide +10% step update with wrap rule; guard GTM enable and CMU_FXCLK0 configuration by checking GTM enable state; add GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR at 2 Hz to toggle LED P13.0; provide functions initGtmTom3phInv(), updateGtmTom3phInvDuty(), and an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction()
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm on TOM1 Cluster_1 with three complementary pairs and hardware deadtime. Configure GTM/CMU: ensure GTM enabled (IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable) then enable CMU_FXCLK0 (IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks). Center-aligned and sync grouping configured via IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig/IfxGtm_Pwm_initChannelConfig and initialized with IfxGtm_Pwm_init. Set deadtime to 1 µs via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDeadTimeImmediate and polarity per HS/LS outputs via IfxGtm_Pwm_setChannelPolarity. Start all channels synchronously with IfxGtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels. Update duties in percent using IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty to apply synchronously at the next period. Route TOM outputs to board pins with IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout after verifying the exact P02.x ↔ TOM1 Cluster_1 channel mapping in IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_LFBGA516. Implement GTM ATOM0 CH0 periodic interrupt (2 Hz) and enable its SRC with IfxSrc_*; in the ISR, toggle P13.0 via IfxPort_togglePin. Provide empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction placeholder.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level PWM driver supports center-aligned operation, channel grouping, synchronous start/update, polarity control, and deadtime updates; it replaces mid-level TOM PwmHl while simplifying multi-channel sync handling.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply percent-based duty updates for U/V/W with +10% step and wrap rule; use non-immediate update API so all channels update synchronously at the next PWM period.

driver_changes: Replaced mid-level IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl with unified IfxGtm_Pwm per requirement.

api_changes.reason: Upgrade to unified high-level PWM driver
Unified duty update API (immediate variant available when required)
Mode configured via high-level init config

api_changes.from: Manual CMU FXCLK setup without DISS guard
api_changes.to: Use IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and then IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks for CMU_FXCLK0

migration_notes.context_preserved: The design still produces 3 complementary PWM pairs on TOM1 with 20 kHz center-aligned timing, 1 µs deadtime, synchronous start/update using TOM1 CH0 as master, and percent-based duty control with the specified step/wrap rule. GTM enable/CMU clocking is guarded. A GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR toggles P13.0 at 2 Hz. Exact TOM1 Cluster_1 channel-to-pin routing for P02.0/2.7, P02.1/2.4, P02.2/2.5 remains TBD and must be confirmed using IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_LFBGA516 before pin setup; use IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout once confirmed.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
